title: Samsara Driver
description: Schema for a Samsara driver entity as returned by the Samsara REST API. Represents a commercial vehicle driver managed in the Samsara platform.

id.description: Unique Samsara-assigned identifier for the driver.

username.description: Driver's login username for the Samsara Driver App.

driverActivationStatus.description: Whether the driver is active or deactivated.

licenseState.description: US state that issued the driver's license (two-letter code).

eldAdverseWeatherExemptionEnabled.description: Whether the adverse weather HOS exemption is enabled.

eldBigDayExemptionEnabled.description: Whether the big day HOS exemption is enabled.

eldDayStartHour.description: The hour of the day at which HOS rollover occurs (0-23).

rulesets.description: HOS rulesets applicable to this driver.

externalIds.description: Customer-defined key-value pairs for external system identifiers.

tags.description: Tags assigned to this driver for organizational grouping.

timezone.description: Driver's home timezone (IANA timezone database name, e.g., America/Chicago).

currentVehicle.description: The vehicle currently assigned to this driver.
